name: measuredEventRef
title: measuredEventRef
description: References an event measurement point, which means measuring a specific connection between consumer and provider for a service event.

parameters.name: Event
parameters.description: Event, determining the data type of the object.

row: Name Name of the measurement endpoint
Path Full path of the measurement endpoint (including namespaces)
ConsumerIndex Index of the consumer. Note that the index may change if consumers are added or removed.
ProviderIndex Index of the provider. Note that the index may change if providers are added or removed.
SubscriptionState State of the event subscription: Unknown: the event subscription was not observed yet Unsubscribed: the event is not subscribed Subscribed: the event is subscribed
